# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Uploads
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UFU_User_Files_Uploads {
    private $upload_subdir = 'user-files';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload_form', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'admin_menu'));
    }

    public function admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'User Files Uploads',
            'User Files Uploads',
            'manage_options',
            'ufu-user-files-uploads',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-media-document'
        );
    }

    private function get_upload_dir() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_dir = trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . $this->upload_subdir . '/';
        $base_url = trailingslashit($uploads['baseurl']) . $this->upload_subdir . '/';

        if (!file_exists($base_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($base_dir);
        }

        return array(
            'dir' => $base_dir,
            'url' => $base_url,
        );
    }

    private function get_user_dir($user_id) {
        $upload = $this->get_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = trailingslashit($upload['dir']) . intval($user_id) . '/';
        $user_url = trailingslashit($upload['url']) . intval($user_id) . '/';

        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }

        return array(
            'dir' => $user_dir,
            'url' => $user_url,
        );
    }

    public function render_upload_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['ufu_status'])) {
            if ($_GET['ufu_status'] === 'success') {
                $message = '<p style="color:green;">File uploaded successfully.</p>';
            } elseif ($_GET['ufu_status'] === 'error' && isset($_GET['ufu_msg'])) {
                $message = '<p style="color:red;">' . esc_html(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_msg'])) . '</p>';
            }
        }

        ob_start();
        echo $message;
        ?>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_file_action', 'ufu_upload_file_nonce'); ?>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file_type">File Type</label><br>
                <select name="ufu_file_type" id="ufu_file_type">
                    <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                    <option value="document">Document</option>
                </select>
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_user_file">Choose File</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_user_file" id="ufu_user_file" required>
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="hidden" name="ufu_upload_submit" value="1">
                <button type="submit">Upload</button>
            </p>
        </form>
        <?php

        $files_html = $this->render_user_files_list(get_current_user_id());

        return ob_get_clean() . $files_html;
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_submit'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'You must be logged in.');
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_file_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_upload_file_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_file_action')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'Security check failed.');
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_user_file'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'No file was uploaded.');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufu_user_file'];

        if (!isset($file['error']) || $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'Upload failed.');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'bmp'          => 'image/bmp',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'          => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'ppt'          => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
            'txt'          => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'          => 'application/rtf',
            'odt'          => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
        );

        $check = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($check['ext']) || empty($check['type'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'File type is not allowed.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $user_dir = $this->get_user_dir($user_id);

        $original_name = sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($file['name']));
        $file_type = isset($_POST['ufu_file_type']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_file_type'])) : 'document';
        $prefix = ($file_type === 'profile_picture') ? 'profile-picture-' : 'document-';
        $filename = wp_unique_filename($user_dir['dir'], $prefix . time() . '-' . $original_name);
        $destination = $user_dir['dir'] . $filename;

        if (!is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'Invalid upload.');
        }

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error', 'Could not save the uploaded file.');
        }

        $file_url = $user_dir['url'] . $filename;

        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = array();
        }

        $user_files[] = array(
            'name'       => $filename,
            'original'   => $original_name,
            'type'       => $file_type,
            'mime'       => $check['type'],
            'path'       => $destination,
            'url'        => $file_url,
            'uploaded'   => current_time('mysql'),
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', $user_files);

        if ($file_type === 'profile_picture' && strpos($check['type'], 'image/') === 0) {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_profile_picture_url', esc_url_raw($file_url));
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('success', 'File uploaded successfully.');
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($status, $message) {
        $referer = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$referer) {
            $referer = home_url('/');
        }

        $redirect_url = add_query_arg(
            array(
                'ufu_status' => $status,
                'ufu_msg'    => rawurlencode($message),
            ),
            $referer
        );

        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }

    private function render_user_files_list($user_id) {
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($files) || empty($files)) {
            return '<p>No files uploaded yet.</p>';
        }

        $html = '<h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3><ul>';
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $label = !empty($file['original']) ? $file['original'] : $file['name'];
            $type = !empty($file['type']) ? $file['type'] : 'file';
            $url = !empty($file['url']) ? $file['url'] : '#';
            $uploaded = !empty($file['uploaded']) ? $file['uploaded'] : '';
            $html .= '<li><a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($label) . '</a> (' . esc_html($type) . ') ' . esc_html($uploaded) . '</li>';
        }
        $html .= '</ul>';

        $profile_picture = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_profile_picture_url', true);
        if (!empty($profile_picture)) {
            $html .= '<h3>Current Profile Picture</h3><p><img src="' . esc_url($profile_picture) . '" alt="" style="max-width:150px;height:auto;"></p>';
        }

        return $html;
    }

    public function admin_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        $users = get_users(array(
            'fields' => array('ID', 'display_name', 'user_email'),
        ));

        echo '<div class="wrap"><h1>User Files Uploads</h1>';

        foreach ($users as $user) {
            $files = get_user_meta($user->ID, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
            if (!is_array($files) || empty($files)) {
                continue;
            }

            echo '<h2>' . esc_html($user->display_name) . ' (' . esc_html($user->user_email) . ')</h2>';
            echo '<ul>';

            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $label = !empty($file['original']) ? $file['original'] : $file['name'];
                $url = !empty($file['url']) ? $file['url'] : '#';
                $type = !empty($file['type']) ? $file['type'] : 'file';
                $uploaded = !empty($file['uploaded']) ? $file['uploaded'] : '';

                echo '<li><a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($label) . '</a> - ' . esc_html($type) . ' - ' . esc_html($uploaded) . '</li>';
            }

            echo '</ul>';
        }

        echo '</div>';
    }
}

new UFU_User_Files_Uploads();
